goal: Update application constants and configuration for v2.0 release
context: Small Python app with shared constants module. Two tasks independently update constants.py — one bumps the version, the other changes timeout. Both edit the same file, creating a merge conflict scenario.

tasks.title: Bump version to 2.0.0
tasks.goal: Update VERSION constant in constants.py to '2.0.0' and update any version references in app.py.

tasks.title: Update timeout and retries
tasks.goal: Change TIMEOUT to 60 and MAX_RETRIES to 5 in constants.py to improve reliability.
constraints: Only change timeout and retry values
